dialogos.texto_en: Phew, that was delicious.\nMaybe steak was the right choice after all.
You ate quite a bit, Nino-san.
Yeah, the sauce was unusual\nand I couldn't help myself.\nIt had a unique sourness to it.
Yes, it was a sauce unlike any I've tasted before.
Are you satisfied?
Yes! Thank you very much!
Now that we're full, shall we wander around aimlessly?
Post-meal exercise, huh?!
Wait, whenever you mention exercise,\nI get a bad feeling.
Ahaha, don't worry.\nI won't suggest we have a competition\nor anything like that.
You can see the ocean from anywhere here, huh-.
Yeah, it's a breathtaking view that never gets old.
I bet it would be even more beautiful\nwhen the sun's setting.
I saw a flyer earlier\nthat there are light-up shows at night.
I saw something mentioned somewhere\nabout projection mapping, too.
This whole town is white,\nso it would be perfect for turning it all into screens, huh.
We could come back at night.\nIt's not far from the hotel.
That's right.
...Hey, Itsuki?\nIs something the matter?
Huh? What?
You've been following me closely from behind for a while now.\nI'm curious as to why.
I-I wonder? What a mystery.\nI'm just walking normally.
...Well, that's fine, then.
(No, that's not normal.\n I feel like I'm being stalked.)
Oh?
What's up?
Look!\nAren't the accessories at this store super nice?
Ah, for sure. They're simple, but eye-catching.
Fu-kun, can we take a look?
Yeah, sure. Do as you please.
Interesting patterns too.\nI wonder, are those waves?
Umm, it seems to be a traditional Okinawan pattern.\nThere's a brief explanation over here.
Wow, that's cool.\nIt'd be perfect as a souvenir of our trip to Okinawa.
Oh, you can even have them made to order.
Really?
Look, it's written here.\nThey say that ring orders for couples\nare especially popular.
(Oh, I see... Couple rings are popular for things\n like commemorating a relationship\n or going on a trip to Okinawa together.)
(There are things like this too.\n I can't afford it now, but...\n I'll remember it.)
U-Uesugi-kun!
Would you like to get some rings?
WHAAA?!
Matching rings are so wonderful!\nI want one! Please buy them!
Hey, Itsuki, calm down!\nYour face is too close!
I-it's okay to be close to you, isn't it?!
HUH?!
I-I mean, we're going out, and all that, right?\nWe came all the way to Okinawa as a couple,\nso let's buy rings to serve as our memory together!
W-well, I think the idea itself is good,\nbut there's a problem%p-2;――
Wh-what kind of problem is there\nfor us to buy matching rings?!
Itsuki.
Wh-what?!
Look at the price.
I-I-I'm sorry!\nI didn't think it would be so expensive!
Well, there's no need to apologize, you know.
No, please let me make an apology!\nI was doing the same thing as earlier...\nOoohh...
Well, maybe save this conversation for your wedding rings.
W-wedding?!
Uesugi-san, do your best to find something\nthat will suit Itsuki.
Y-yeah, of course.
Oohh?!\nAre you proposing, Uesugi-san?!
Hey, quiet! Don't jump to conclusions like that!
But you've got to be thinking about it, right-?\nIsn't that right, Itsuki-chan?
...She's frozen.
Itsuki-saaan, come back!
Hmmm...
Could it be that you think something's off too, Ichika?
About Itsuki-chan, right?
Yeah.\nShe's acting kind of weird.
I agree.\nItsuki-chan isn't the type to be selfish like that\nand ask for things, like she was doing with Futaro-kun.
Hmm, but they're dating, so\nit's not necessarily a bad thing\nto be a little selfish, right?
Maybe, you know?\nIt's just because they're on a trip,\nand their excitement is getting the best of them.
If it's a trip with her boyfriend,\neven serious Itsuki-chan\nmight get a little carried away.
Uh-huh. That's probably it.
